COURSE WORKBOOK
with Gretta Van Riel, Rob Ward, Chase Dimond
Richard Li, Nick Shackelford
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

In this lesson, I’m going to give you an overview of
the supply chain operations for ecommerce. Even
at this stage in your company, many founders still
consider this process complicated and difficult. I’ll
show you how every topic covered in this module fits
in the grand scheme of things. I hope to demystify
the process so you realize that specialized skills
aren’t necessary to run tight supply chain operations.
The Three Main Supply Chain Components
Sourcing
• 	Finding quality suppliers
• 	Setting up a good working relationship
• 	Negotiating and collaborating with suppliers
Production
• 	Placing an order
• 	Locking in a production slot
• 	Sourcing raw material
• 	Nailing down a delivery date
Logistics
• 	Freight forwarding (Supplier to warehouse)
• 	Warehousing (3PL or yourself)
• 	Last Mile Delivery (Warehouse to customer)
LESSON:
THE SUPPLY CHAIN PUZZLE
(PRIMER)
MODULE:
MANUFACTURING &
OPERATIONS AT SCALE
ACTION ITEMS

packaging to control your own margin.”
